title: Nosey
body:
Ever thought more Minecraft mobs should have noses? Well, if so, then you should take a look at Nosey.
This mod adds noses to a some of the mobs in Minecraft.

Currently you can see noses on the following mobs:
  • Bee
  • Creeper
  • Ghast
This mod was requested by Darkosto

Need a server? Get 20% off your first month by using promo code "mrbysco"
